title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: aliyevaladddin/AladdinAI
summary: AladdinAI: open-source BYOI (Bring Your Own Infrastructure) AI Agent platform. Connect your own VMs, NVIDIA NIM, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama — build and manage AI agents visually.

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: barbaria888/KubeOps-AI
summary: KubeOps AI - An AI-Agent acting as a Kubernetes copilot that detects, explains, and fixes cluster issues with human-in-the-loop control.

title: tylerreckart/arbiter
summary: The intelligence layer for whatever you're building.

title: arm00pv/nexus-swarm
summary: NEXUS — Autonomous 7-agent AI code analysis swarm with Lean4 formal verification, Darwin-Gödel self-improvement, and Mamba-3 SSM GPU inference. Zero cloud cost.

title: ebongard/renfield
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant with voice satellites, 100+ tool integrations, RAG knowledge base, and full offline capability. Built with FastAPI + React + Ollama.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: laurykb/AI_for_geopolitics
summary: Agentic geopolitical simulation: LLM country-agents constrained by real data negotiate under a Game Master, with sourced hybrid RAG and an explainable risk engine.

title: CPruett24/jarvis-ai-platform
summary: Local-first AI assistant and agent platform built with Python, Ollama, Faster-Whisper, SQLite, and Streamlit.

title: dovvnloading/Cortex
summary: Cortex is a fast, private desktop AI assistant for running local Large Language Models with Ollama. Everything stays on your device: no cloud, no external servers, and no third parties.

title: hhagenbuch/castaway
summary: Agent runtime for disconnected environments: local-model failover, deferred side-effects with revalidation, offline-aware evals

title: dryvist/nix-ai
summary: Your AI coding toolkit, declared in Nix — Claude, Gemini, Copilot, 15+ MCP servers, one flake

title: Antonio-Prado/zautte
summary: Assistente virtuale RAG per qualsiasi sito web — widget JS embeddable, FastAPI, Ollama/Claude, numpy vector store

title: attenlabs/hotato
summary: Regression testing for voice agents. The transcript passed; the call failed. hotato scores the turn timing and checks what the agent said against what the backend did, then gates CI. Self-hosted, MIT.

title: salahuddinuqaili/tether
summary: A thin iPhone PWA client for capable AI — your desktop's local + cloud models, and (next) your own desktop agent, over Tailscale. GitHub editing included. No backend, no App Store.

title: SciSpectator/genevariate
summary: Gene Expression Variability Analysis Platform with AI-powered biological metadata extraction. Runs locally via Ollama — no cloud, no API keys.
